purpose: Defines Buddy's sellable debugging system for apps, bots, workflows, AI creation projects, pull requests, and revenue systems.
positioning: Professional debug desk that captures evidence, reproduces failures, isolates root cause, patches safely, verifies tests, and packages client-ready handoff notes.
live_action_rule: Debugging can prepare fixes, reports, branches, and pull request packets. Merges, deploys, customer outreach, credential changes, and money movement require owner approval.
